summary: NFC Backend Infrastructure Testing Complete - All 27 tests passed. POST /api/nfc/register, POST /api/nfc/scan, POST /api/nfc/unlink, GET /api/nfc/tags endpoints fully functional. CORS configured for mobile (exp://localhost:19000). Zero mock data - all data from PostgreSQL + MongoDB.

nfc_register_new_tag.details: POST /api/nfc/register successfully registers tag_uid + guest_id + venue_id

nfc_register_duplicate_409.details: Registering same tag to different guest returns 409 Conflict

nfc_register_idempotent.details: Re-registering same tag+guest combo is idempotent (returns existing binding)

nfc_register_validates_guest.details: Registering tag to non-existent guest returns 404

nfc_register_deactivates_previous.details: Registering new tag deactivates previous tag for same guest

nfc_register_reactivates_unlinked.details: Re-registering an unlinked tag works (reactivates binding)

nfc_scan_returns_profile.details: POST /api/nfc/scan returns full guest profile + tab context + risk_chips + value_chips

nfc_scan_updates_timestamp.details: Scan updates last_scanned timestamp on each scan

nfc_scan_includes_chips.details: Scan response includes risk_chips and value_chips arrays

nfc_tags_list_active.details: GET /api/nfc/tags?status=active returns active tags with guest names

nfc_tags_list_all.details: GET /api/nfc/tags?status=all returns all tags including unlinked

cors_mobile_origins.details: CORS configured with exp://localhost:19000 and exp://localhost:8081 for React Native

jwt_auth_all_nfc_endpoints.details: All NFC endpoints require JWT Bearer token and work with valid token

existing_nfc_data.details: Existing test NFC binding (04:A3:2B:1C:D4:E5:F6 → Carlos NFC Test) works correctly

seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_ prefixed guests and NFC tags during testing. Existing test NFC binding (Carlos NFC Test) verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: NFC backend infrastructure complete. All 4 NFC endpoints (/register, /scan, /unlink, /tags) working with PostgreSQL nfc_tags table. CORS configured for mobile apps. WebSocket broadcasting is fire-and-forget (not explicitly tested). Mobile API documentation at /app/docs/MOBILE_API_HANDOFF.md.

data_verified.nfc_tags_table: PostgreSQL nfc_tags table exists with proper schema
